author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Pali Canon - Itivuttaka
content:
Itivuttaka - Contents

Chapter 1

Six poisons. Importance of insight in transcending psychological 4-7
Benefits of meditation/insight 5
Five Hindrances and five asvaras 6 (64)
Developing insight on the basis of Samatha and Vipassana 8-10

Chapter 2
Moha-Confusion 10-11
Ignorance the obstacle, Craving the fetter. 12
Being aware of mental contents 13
Deference to kalayana mitrata 14
Unity and Disharmony within the Order , Leading retreats and
sharing responsibility 15
Death 24

Chapter 3
Expressing positive emotion 30
Dana 32
Rebirth 33
Lies, refusing to communicate 35
Gurus 37
Trust 38
Goodwill which is the heart's release 40


The Twos

Chapter 1

Guarding the doors of the senses 43-48
Food 46
Satisfying desire 48
Insight 49
Fasting 53
Remorse 55
Wrong/Right views 60
Five hindrances 64
Scrupulousness, Zeal 66
Style of the Itivuttaka 70
Sangveda 72

Chapter 3

Seclusion 73
Recognizing the Unskilful 76
Hiri/Ottapa 71
Incest and taboos 83
Nirvana with/without remainder 91
Unification of energies in meditation 95
The Threes

Chapter 1

Biological needs - Marriage - Having Children 104

Chapter 2

Practice in lay-life 116
The Eyes 119
Being and place 122

Chapter 3

Escapism and Sanctuary 128

Chapter 4

Deva life 139
The Four Requisites 140
Formulations of the Dharma 142
Respect for parents - Metta bhavana 146
